{{Quote|When the Republic defeated our fleets I learned a valuable lesson: it's far better to be a freelance mercenary in a war than to be a soldier for a losing side.|Ergeron|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Ergeron''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] who fought during the [[Mandalorian Wars]] alongside [[Canderous Ordo]]. After the war, he began working as a freelance [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]], ending up on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] by the last year of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He expressed a dislike for the [[Echani/Legends|Echani]] and [[Iridonian (species)|Iridonian]] mercenaries who were looking for work at the small [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in [[Ahto City]] that catered to the mercenary population of that [[Planet/Legends|world]], claiming that the former were cowardly dancers and that the latter were little more than bloodthirsty savages. During his stay there, he had a brief meeting with [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and Canderous with whom they chatted about the old days.

==Biography==
During the [[Mandalorian Wars]] Ergeron fought along side Canderous Ordo, together they became a valuable asset to the Mandalorian Cause. Ergeron was a big believer in the Mandalorian code of honor, where respect came from combat.

==Behind the scenes==
Ergeron is only named if Canderous is in the player's party when they talk to him, otherwise he is simply identified by the tag "Mandalorian mercenary".

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
